narrative_arc: A young Indian girl named Ananya discovers a dormant mechanical tiger made of brass and turquoise in the basement of a centuries-old village temple.
art_style: Detailed line art with vibrant watercolor washes; gold-leaf accents on the tiger.
lettering_style: Classic comic San-serif with soft-edged bubbles.

comic_panels.characters: Ananya (8 years old, wearing a bright yellow cotton dress, curious expression) holding a small flashlight.
comic_panels.action: Ananya slowly descends the ancient stone stairs of the temple basement.
comic_panels.background: Dark, cobweb-filled room with dusty carvings on the walls; the flashlight beam cuts through the dark.
comic_panels.dialogue: Grandmother said there was a secret down here...

comic_panels.characters: Ananya's eyes wide with wonder, reflecting a faint teal glow.
comic_panels.action: She pulls back a heavy, dusty tarp to reveal something metallic.
comic_panels.background: Glinting brass and turquoise patterns emerging from the shadows.

comic_panels.characters: Ananya stands small in front of a massive, intricately designed mechanical tiger. The tiger is hunched over, its turquoise eyes slowly flickering to life.
comic_panels.action: The mechanical tiger's head tilts slightly; clockwork gears are visible in its joints.
comic_panels.background: Stone pillars of the temple basement; incense smoke drifting from a corner.

comic_panels.characters: Ananya bravely reaching out her hand to touch the tiger's brass nose.
comic_panels.action: A connection is made; a small spark of blue light at the point of contact.
comic_panels.background: Soft glow illuminating the entire basement.

negative_prompt: modern technology, clean environment, low detail, different characters, inconsistent art style
